title: agrostis vulgaris var. nigra
intro: Agrostis vulgaris var. nigra, also known as black bentgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been employed to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing skin irritations. Agrostis vulgaris var. nigra can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
